examples.no: regnværet var et skår i gleden
examples.en: the rainy weather was a blot on the happiness

examples.no: eneste skår i gleden var at keeperen ble skadd
examples.en: the only blot on the happiness was that the goalkeeper got injured

examples.no: skåret i gleden var at faren ikke kunne komme
examples.en: the blot on the happiness was that father could not come
